message:
fix: use comma-separated tags in fixtures to match parser format

The story card parser does line-by-line key: value parsing, not full
YAML. Fixtures using YAML array syntax (- smoke) silently produced
wrong tag values. Added tests to verify tags parse correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 id: cli-smoke
 title: Echo app responds to input
 status: ready
-tags:
-  - smoke
+tags: smoke
 ---
 
 # Echo app responds to input

@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 id: smoke-test
 title: Page loads and displays content
 status: ready
-tags:
-  - smoke
+tags: smoke
 ---
 
 # Page loads and displays content
